On the eve of her introduction she uncovers her fiance's deportation fraud plot, an executive coup for her white cousin, and that childhood enemy Ryder Marlow may not be an enemy at all.

To claim her late father's inheritance Shelby must marry, so she weds poor stranger Griffin, unaware he is a billionaire who has admired her since a chance meeting three years ago.

synopsis_short: Forced into an arranged marriage they both despise, Nick and Lexey have their souls switched by Cupid and must live in each other's bodies.

Alpha princess Maeve enters the kingdom's brutal war college and finds a fated bond with Saxon Blackmoor, the most powerful wolf there and her sworn enemy.
Dying senior Isabel plans to confess to best friend Alex, but a misunderstanding ruins their friendship; ten years later Alex finds her vlogs and learns a truth that changes his world.
Forced to take her sister's place and marry Tommy Anderson to save the family business, Emma finds him handsome and wealthy and falls for him despite the contract.

primary_title: Mommy, I Got You A Date
synopsis_short: Annie left imprisoned Liam under pressure from the wealthy Holland family, hiding her pregnancy; six years later heir Liam wins her back through their son Henry.

synopsis_short: Genius heiress Blair returns home to find her mother beaten and branded a homewrecker by her three brothers, with the maid installed as the new Mrs. Beaumont; she fights to expose the betrayal.

primary_title: She's Not Homeless, She's Healer Goddess!
synopsis_short: Accused of being a gold digger for her hobo clothes, Trixie is the only one who can cure the nation's richest war hero, Lysander Armstrong, and win his heart.
Lion, once the Grand Slam champion of golf, disappears after losing his wife to care for his family, until the game calls him back.
Based on the novel by L. Steele. After her fiance cheats, Vivian flash-marries a hot silver fox, only to realize he is her ex's dad. The deal: two weeks of marriage.
Scarlett Jameson, imprisoned for a crime she didn't commit, lands on the radar of prison guard Jack Rayne, whose taunts may hide a darker motive.
Assassin Madeline Archer doesn't want bloodshed, but if she stops killing her little sister dies. Forced to take a contract on Hayden Kent, she runs into problems.

primary_title: The Billionaire Married a Homeless Girl
synopsis_short: After a one-night stand Adele Moore becomes pregnant; her father kicks her out and with nowhere to go her life takes a billionaire turn.

primary_title: I Had a Baby without You
synopsis_short: Five years ago curvy waitress Scarlett saved Brandon's life and spent one night with him before vanishing. Now she's back, unrecognizable, and he's a recluse.
Framed and stripped of her freedom, her child, and her love, Nicole returns seven years later as a nanny in the very house that destroyed her.
Reese unexpectedly reunites with ex-best friend and first love Grayson four years after he broke her heart, and agrees to pose as his fake girlfriend.

primary_title: Cancel the Wedding, Queen Moves On
synopsis_short: Maria's perfect life crumbles at her fiance's affair; taking control, she is drawn to Alec, her long-lost ex and now a billionaire.

primary_title: In Love with a Single Farmer-Daddy

Secretly married to college sweetheart Desmond for ten years, Beatrice discovers his affair with a wealthy socialite and everything changes.
Sofia, desperate to pay her mother's medical bills, agrees to marry comatose billionaire Samuel.

Poor orphan Every enters a contract marriage with billionaire Julian Barlow, engineered by his eight-year-old daughter Bella, and it blossoms into real love.

To fund her sister's cancer treatment, Katie contracts to bear a mysterious billionaire's heir; proving the relationship to grandpa pulls her and Mr. Brandt closer despite the no-falling-in-love rule.
Abused and overworked Lyla saves gentle president Leo, becomes unexpectedly pregnant, and their blossoming love is tested by the conspiracy hidden in her past.
Needing an heir, Oscar turns to surrogacy but his sperm is accidentally given to Phoebe during a gynecological exam; a contract marriage follows to keep the baby.

primary_title: Fake Married to My Billionaire CEO

High-school sophomore Ivy, a secretly wealthy heiress with an angelic voice, is used as a voice double by fake bestie Vanessa; after catching her boyfriend cheating with Vanessa she reclaims her spotlight with quarterback Blake.

Pregnant Mia becomes a rogue when a witch's spell turns her chosen mate Cameron away; expelled, she meets her fated mate, but neither alpha will share.
World's top hacker Max Lennox is shoved off a roof by his girlfriend just before exposing Pentagon secrets; amnesiac but still a genius, he rebuilds with programmer Suki Ruskin.

primary_title: He Said the Baby Was Too Expensive
synopsis_short: Heiress Iris gave up her fortune for average-joe Dorian; heavily pregnant, she battles his controlling mother and spineless husband until her wealthy father appears.
For their sixth anniversary Natalie discovers Ethan gave his stored sperm to his ex so she could have his baby, and he moves the woman and child into their home; Natalie walks.

primary_title: We Never Said We Went Bankrupt!
synopsis_short: False bankruptcy rumors turn the allied Wilson and Meyer families against the powerful York family, who endure abuse at a wedding and a 70th birthday before striking back.
The centuries-old alliance between the Tepes and Velda vampire families is threatened by human waitress Sammantha Evans at Club Dracula, owned by Alarik Tepes.
Adrian leaves daughter Esther in an overheating car while with his childhood sweetheart; ignoring her call for help, it falls to mother Claire to race to save her.
Giselle saved blind Logan and gave him her corneas, vanishing pregnant just as he regained sight; five years later the Hale heir searches for the wife and ailing daughter he doesn't know are his.
A powerful CEO discovers his daughter and frees his college sweetheart from prison; together they overcome years of resentment to protect their child from those who tore them apart.

primary_title: My Ex is in the Navy SEALs
synopsis_short: Regina broke up with Julian six years ago to protect his military career from her debt; they reunite abroad, he a commanding officer, she a single mother.

primary_title: Secret Life of A Mafia Sweetheart
synopsis_short: Two heirs of rival mafia families fall in love under false identities; a gang war leaves Alyssa with amnesia and Dylan poses as her fiance amid betrayal and buried family secrets.

primary_title: Sisterhood of Lies: Pledge for Revenge
synopsis_short: After Ashlyn dies in a sorority hazing accident, identical twin June takes her place to get revenge on the real killers: Ashlyn's back-stabbing bestie and her frat-bro boyfriend.

primary_title: Leaving My Alpha Husband in Ice Cold Regret
synopsis_short: Discovering her alpha husband cheating, Snow offers herself as ritual sacrifice to be eternally frozen, breaking their mate-bond and leaving him ice cold regret.

primary_title: Watch Out! She's a Mastermind Heiress
synopsis_short: Countryside-raised Isabella Patton returns to her wealthy birth family, outduels scheming cousin Eliza with genius medical and tech skills, and stays just out of fiance Oliver Bates's grasp.

primary_title: Pregnant and Married to a Movie Star
synopsis_short: Pregnant broke bartender Lacey poses as noncommittal movie star Chris Powell's fiancee; neither knows the baby she carries is actually his.
A car accident leaves Winnie's daughter dying; her doctor husband Aaron saves his first love Monica's child instead, and Winnie seeks justice against interference and distrust.
Teacher Charlotte Swan starts fresh at St. James Academy until school king Timothy Wolfe decides he wants her; forbidden, taboo, and she has a dark secret that could ruin them both.
A former fashion icon living quietly as a housewife is dragged back to the center of her empire by a betrayal at the Grand Maple Gala.
Told she doesn't have long to live, Faith searches for her lost family, only to discover they are the people she hates most.

primary_title: The Return of the Lost Heiress
synopsis_short: Mute since her father's death, lost heiress Lana is adopted by a loving stranger while her birth family unknowingly mistreats the daughter they keep searching for.
Sold by her father and brother instead of going to MIT, Taylor escapes, becomes the richest person in the world, and returns to settle the score.
Famous violinist Christy is forced to betray the love of her life; years later an illness steals her music while her daughter schemes to bring Daddy back.
A school janitor who saves a child from kidnapping flash-marries the girl's secret-billionaire father as betrayals and a vengeful ex circle their new family.
Nonverbal Eva endures a marriage of duty to her childhood protector Declan while his mistress schemes to drive her out.
Dying Dakota offers a contract relationship to untouchable billionaire Jaxon, then breaks his heart to protect him as a masked stranger keeps saving her.

primary_title: Don't Mess with a Prep School Princess
synopsis_short: Released from juvie after taking the fall for her boyfriend, Sierra learns she is the long-lost Lancaster heiress and returns to Hawthorne Prep to reclaim her place from a fake best friend.

primary_title: Pregnant by My Ex's Professor Dad
synopsis_short: After catching her boyfriend cheating, Emily has a one-night stand with a stranger who turns out to be her new professor, then discovers she is pregnant.

primary_title: Fated to My Homeless Billionaire Alpha
synopsis_short: Betrayed Elara impulsively marries a humble homeless man who is secretly the billionaire Alpha of the werewolf world.

primary_title: The Virgin Stripper and the Hockey Star
synopsis_short: Quiet student Jenna secretly strips to pay her sister's medical bills until her cocky hockey-star school rival walks into the club.
Wolf princess Lia chooses love over duty, is betrayed and rejected by her mate, then bonds with a secretive new mate and sets out to reclaim her throne.

primary_title: Go Away Stepmom, You Have It All Wrong!
synopsis_short: Rushing home for her father's wedding, Margaret is mistaken by her new stepmother for his mistress and must expose the woman's true colors.

primary_title: Claimed by My Ex's Alpha Brother
synopsis_short: Wolfless Ella catches her Beta mate cheating and falls into the arms of his brother, the newly returned Alpha who has loved her since childhood.
Cherished princess Seraph is forced to grow up overnight when her husband and best friend help her sister's killer escape justice.
Ella, a Luna werewolf hidden from herself, seeks motherhood through insemination and is accidentally given the sperm of an Alpha wolf.
